Subject ID and consent group of participants with or without congenital adrenal hyperplasia wwing to 21-Hydroxylase and involved in the "Long-Term Outcome in Offspring and Mothers of Dexamethasone-Treated Pregnancies at Risk for Classical Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia Owing to 21-Hydroxylase Deficiency" project.
